requirement_summary: Support canonical fact sheet types and relationships

Support strategic initiative planning with timeline visibility
Support rule-based automation and notification workflows
Replace static sample data with persistent API-backed model

Capture immutable audit trail for mutation events

Support workspace branding and settings management
Support maintenance mode with admin-only access
Support user invite and lifecycle status transitions
Support default role assignment for new SSO users

Support token rotation and immediate revocation
Support OpenAPI documentation for REST endpoints
Support GraphQL pagination and complexity guardrails
Support GraphQL upload endpoint for bulk operations

Support MCP server endpoint and scoped tool visibility
Define Objective fact sheet semantics and KPI linkage
Define Platform fact sheet lifecycle semantics
Define Initiative with Idea, Program, Project, Epic subtypes
